name_en: 🔥 New version geometric bag small size Nappa leather Featherlight Puzzle Handbag, original imported Nappa calfskin 💥 Outlined with unique geometric lines to create a rectangular shape. Soft and lightweight Nappa leather injects a casual and lazy style into the handbag. *Can be worn on shoulder, crossbody or hand held* Removable adjustable shoulder strap, decorated with rotating buckle *Zipper closure, articulated zipper pull *One external zippered back pocket, one internal slip pocket *Removable, decorated with hidden pocket and balloon dice *Rectangular metal studs *💄 This small size version is made of soft Nappa calfskin *Small Puzzle can hold for example a large wallet 👛 All sizes of phones 📱 and sunglasses 🕶 Can be carried crossbody, on shoulder, handbag or top handle *Removable 💙💚

Color: Deep Red
Model: 9096
Size: 24CM~16CM~10CM
